perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a black oversized t-shirt and grey pants sitting on a brown leather sofa in a studio setting. (2) He speaks energetically to the camera, gesturing frequently with his hands and holding a stack of papers which he later rolls up to emphasize his points. (3) The scene frequently cuts between a medium shot and close-ups of his face as his expressions shift from stern to a mocking smile. (4) He remains the sole person visible on screen throughout the video in the same indoor environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks rapidly with a persuasive and slightly aggressive tone in a mix of Mandarin and Taiwanese Hokkien. (2) An upbeat, electronic background track with a steady rhythm plays continuously. (3) Periodic 'ding' and 'swish' sound effects accompany text transitions. (4) Near the end, the audio includes ambient sounds of off-screen voices laughing and clapping along with the main speaker.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional white subtitles appear at the bottom for all dialogue. (2) Decorative variety-show style text like '志工' (Volunteer), '12.5年' (12.5 years), and '20萬!!' (200,000!!) appear in the middle of the frame to highlight the terms of his social service proposal. (3) A caption '好里家社福協會' (Hao Li Jia Social Welfare Association) identifies a specific entity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Context -> Proposal of Plan -> Mathematical Calculation -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator visible; other male and female voices are heard off-screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man with styled short brown hair wearing a black t-shirt and light grey trousers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A white brick wall decorated with cartoon artwork, a 'Lawson Station' miniature sign, and Bearbrick figures on a shelf.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Proposed Solution -> Evidence/Calculation -> Final Call
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a public address where the speaker proposes a social service/volunteer plan as a 'last chance' for a debtor or someone involved in a legal dispute to repay their debt through community work (like beach cleaning), using humor and calculations to argue for its efficiency.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The mention of the social welfare association appears to be part of a non-commercial proposal or social campaign rather than a paid product placement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Taiwanese-accented speech, aggressive gesturing with rolled paper, frequent variety-show text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video blends entertainment with a semi-serious message about social responsibility and debt, typical of Taiwanese influencer commentary styles.
